LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CHERYL WILLIAMS MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS; REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS DENIED. EVEN IF THE COURT COULD TELL FROM THE FACE OF THE COMPLAINT AND JUDICIALLY NOTICEABLE DOCUMENTS THAT DEFENDANT PROCURED THE INFORMATION IN A PRIVILEGED WAY, WHICH THE COURT DOES NOT DECIDE, DEFENDANT WOULD HAVE FAILED TO ESTABLISH HER AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE OF PRIVILEGE BECAUSE ISSUES WOULD REMAIN WITH RESPECT TO HOW SHE USED THAT INFORMATION IN THE PAST OR WHAT SHE MIGHT DO WITH IT IN THE FUTURE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189

Off Calendar Apr-05-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT CHERYL WILLIAMS Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Request For Judicial Notice IS DENIED. EVEN IF THE COURT COULD TELL FROM THE FACE OF THE COMPLAINT AND JUDICIALLY NOTICEABLE DOCUMENTS THAT DEFENDANT PROCURED THE INFORMATION IN A PRIVILEGED WAY, WHICH THE COURT DOES NOT DECIDE, DEFENDANT WOULD HAVE FAILED TO ESTABLISH HER AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE OF PRIVILEGE BECAUSE ISSUES WOULD REMAIN WITH RESPECT TO HOW SHE USED THAT INFORMATION IN THE PAST OR WHAT SHE MIGHT DO WITH IT IN THE FUTURE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB/CK
